_comment: Copy this file to config.json and replace every value below with YOUR OWN values. config.json is git-ignored and will never be committed.
_comment_api_key: PREFERRED auth. Generate an official API key at platform.pixai.art (you can set its lifetime up to ~2 years). When present it is used as the Bearer credential for ALL calls, so you do NOT need U3T or a browser token, and never have to recapture an expiring login. Leave blank to fall back to the browser-JWT path (token.txt / PIXAI_TOKEN).
_comment_user_id: Your PixAI numeric user ID — found in your profile URL: pixai.art/profile/<YOUR_ID_HERE>
_comment_u3t: Only needed if you are NOT using PIXAI_API_KEY. Captured from DevTools — the 'u3t' field in the listUserTaskSummaries request.
_comment_hash: Captured from DevTools Network tab — see README Step 2. This is extensions.persistedQuery.sha256Hash from the listUserTaskSummaries request.
_comment_full_meta: Optional — only needed for --full-meta and --backfill-full-meta. Capture from DevTools while viewing an image detail page (see README -> Full Meta). These values are different from PERSISTED_QUERY_HASH above.
